title: Molecular assays to detect the presence and viability of Phytophthora ramorum and Grosmannia clavigera
author: Feau, Nicolas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Protocols for the RNA and DNA extractions, cDNA synthesis and qPCR and RT-qPCR for detecting and assessing viability of the Phytophthora ramorum and Grosmannia clavigera tree pathogens.
steps_raw: Protocols for the RNA and DNA extractions, cDNA synthesis and qPCR and RT-qPCR for detecting and assessing viability of the Phytophthora ramorum and Grosmannia clavigera tree pathogens.
